title: shadow-utils security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2:4.9-15]
- nss.c: shadow_logfd to stderr. Resolves: RHEL-83431
- vipw: restore the original terminal pgrp after editing. Resolves: RHEL-70844 and RHEL-72940
full_text:
[2:4.9-15]
- nss.c: shadow_logfd to stderr. Resolves: RHEL-83431
- vipw: restore the original terminal pgrp after editing. Resolves: RHEL-70844 and RHEL-72940

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20559-0.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2024-56433.html
